content.speakerText: I'm really grateful for everything you've taught me.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你教我的一切。
expectedAnswers: You've been a great asset—we'll miss you.
I truly appreciate your guidance, and I hope you're doing amazing!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的回应与情感共鸣
语言准确性：语法正确，用词得体，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 gratitude, appreciate, miss 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I hope we can stay in touch—I'd love to hear how things go for you.
content.speakerTextCn: 希望我们能保持联系，很想听你未来的发展。
expectedAnswers: Will do. I’ll send you a connection request this week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动提出后续联系方式，延续关系
语言准确性：使用了恰当的动词短语如 'message on LinkedIn' 或 'grab coffee'
表达自然度：语气友好、非机械，符合真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 stay in touch, message, catch up 等关键词
